question.label: Marking friction
question.name: Marking took so long — what specifically made it slow?

answer: there was a marked improvement in the sutdents

assessment.note: Pivot/off-topic: she answered with learner improvement rather than what made marking slow; this also volunteers class impact evidence worth using next.
